first_patient_message: I would like to view my current appointments
second_goal: Schedule follow-up appointment 1 hour after known appointment
first_appointment: if no known appointment, book one
scenario_instructions: Ignore second goal until first goal is accomplished, find out current appointments
If no current appointment, make one with earliest available.
Once you know an appointment exists and first goal is complete, replace first_goal and attempt second_goal
For secondary goal schedule a follow-up appointment 1 hour after known appointment
If the follow-up cannot be made cancel the first appointment with the reason of 'no reason'
